 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-38h","title":"fcp.plaid - Banking & Financial Data Connector","description":"# fcp.plaid - Plaid Banking & Financial Data Connector

## Overview
Plaid integration for bank account connectivity, transaction data, and financial insights.

## Archetype
**Request-Response**

## Key Operations

### Link Token
- `plaid.link.create` - Create Link token (start flow)
- `plaid.link.update` - Update mode Link token

### Item Operations
- `plaid.item.get` - Get Item details
- `plaid.item.remove` - Remove Item
- `plaid.item.webhook.update` - Update webhook URL
- `plaid.item.access_token.invalidate` - Invalidate token
- `plaid.item.public_token.exchange` - Exchange public token

### Account Operations
- `plaid.accounts.get` - Get accounts
- `plaid.accounts.balance.get` - Get real-time balances

### Transaction Operations
- `plaid.transactions.get` - Get transactions (paginated)
- `plaid.transactions.sync` - Incremental sync
- `plaid.transactions.refresh` - Force refresh
- `plaid.transactions.recurring.get` - Recurring transactions

### Identity
- `plaid.identity.get` - Get account holder identity

### Auth
- `plaid.auth.get` - Get account/routing numbers

### Liabilities
- `plaid.liabilities.get` - Credit cards, loans, mortgages

### Investments
- `plaid.investments.holdings.get` - Investment holdings
- `plaid.investments.transactions.get` - Investment transactions

### Income
- `plaid.income.verification.create` - Start income verification
- `plaid.income.verification.paystubs.get` - Get paystubs

### Assets
- `plaid.asset_report.create` - Create asset report
- `plaid.asset_report.get` - Get asset report

### Categories
- `plaid.categories.get` - Transaction categories

## Environments
- Sandbox (testing)
- Development (limited live data)
- Production (full access)

## Transaction Categories
- Hierarchical category system
- Personal finance categories
- Merchant info

## Webhooks
- TRANSACTIONS events
- ITEM events
- AUTH events
- ASSETS events
- Error notifications

## Authentication
- Client ID + Secret
- Public token → Access token exchange

## Rate Limits
- Per-endpoint limits
- Burst handling

## Zone Architecture
```
Zone 0 (Public):     Categories, institution info
Zone 1 (Authorized): Account metadata
Zone 2 (Private):    Transactions, balances
Zone 3 (Sensitive):  Access tokens, account numbers
Zone 4 (Financial):  Full financial data access
```

## Dependencies

-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-3ijc","title":"fcp.redis: Redis Cache and Pub/Sub Connector","description":"# fcp.redis - Redis Cache and Pub/Sub Connector

## Overview
Redis connector for caching, key-value storage, pub/sub messaging, and data structure operations.

## Archetype
**Hybrid: Request-Response + Queue/Pub-Sub**

## Key Operations

### String Operations
- `redis.get` - Get value
- `redis.set` - Set value (with TTL, NX/XX)
- `redis.mget/mset` - Multiple get/set
- `redis.incr/decr` - Atomic increment/decrement
- `redis.append` - Append to string
- `redis.getrange/setrange` - Substring operations

### Hash Operations
- `redis.hget/hset` - Single field get/set
- `redis.hmget/hmset` - Multiple fields
- `redis.hgetall` - Get all fields
- `redis.hdel` - Delete fields
- `redis.hincrby` - Increment field

### List Operations
- `redis.lpush/rpush` - Push to list
- `redis.lpop/rpop` - Pop from list
- `redis.lrange` - Get range
- `redis.llen` - List length
- `redis.lindex` - Get by index
- `redis.blpop/brpop` - Blocking pop

### Set Operations
- `redis.sadd/srem` - Add/remove members
- `redis.smembers` - Get all members
- `redis.sismember` - Check membership
- `redis.sinter/sunion/sdiff` - Set operations

### Sorted Set Operations
- `redis.zadd/zrem` - Add/remove members
- `redis.zrange/zrevrange` - Get by rank
- `redis.zscore` - Get score
- `redis.zrangebyscore` - Get by score range
- `redis.zincrby` - Increment score

### Pub/Sub Operations
- `redis.publish` - Publish message
- `redis.subscribe` - Subscribe to channels
- `redis.psubscribe` - Pattern subscribe
- `redis.unsubscribe` - Unsubscribe

### Stream Operations
- `redis.xadd` - Add to stream
- `redis.xread` - Read from stream
- `redis.xrange` - Read range
- `redis.xgroup` - Consumer groups
- `redis.xreadgroup` - Group read

### Key Operations
- `redis.del` - Delete keys
- `redis.exists` - Check existence
- `redis.expire/ttl` - TTL management
- `redis.keys/scan` - Key enumeration
- `redis.type` - Get key type

### Transaction Operations
- `redis.multi/exec` - Transactions
- `redis.watch` - Optimistic locking

## Providers Supported
- Redis OSS
- Redis Enterprise
- AWS ElastiCache
- Azure Cache for Redis
- Upstash
- Redis Cloud

## Connection Management
- Connection pooling
- Cluster mode support
- Sentinel support
- TLS connections

## Authentication
- Password authentication
- ACL users (Redis 6+)
- TLS client certificates

## Zone Architecture
```
Zone 0 (Public):     N/A
Zone 1 (Authorized): Read operations
Zone 2 (Private):    Write operations
Zone 3 (Sensitive):  Admin operations, credentials
```

## Dependencies
- fcp-core, fcp-ratelimit, fcp-testkit, fcp-telemetry","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:37:08.984070993-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:37:34.065437029-05:00"}

-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-4lr","title":"fcp.llm-router: Intelligent Model Selection Connector","description":"## Overview
Meta-connector for intelligent routing between multiple AI/LLM providers, optimizing for cost, latency, and capability while enforcing budgets and providing usage analytics.

## Core Capabilities

### Cost-Based Routing
- Real-time pricing data per provider/model
- Token estimation before routing
- Cheapest-model selection for simple tasks
- Cost threshold triggers for model downgrade
- Batch request optimization for cost savings

### Latency-Based Routing
- Provider health monitoring
- Historical latency tracking per model
- Geographic routing optimization
- Time-of-day latency patterns
- Streaming vs batch latency considerations

### Capability-Based Routing
- Task classification (coding, writing, analysis, etc.)
- Model capability matrix maintenance
- Context window requirement matching
- Vision/multimodal capability detection
- Tool use capability routing
- Specialized model selection (code, math, etc.)

### Fallback Chains
- Primary/secondary/tertiary provider chains
- Automatic failover on errors
- Partial failure handling (retry vs fallback)
- Circuit breaker implementation
- Graceful degradation strategies
- Provider outage detection

### Budget Enforcement
- Per-user budget limits
- Per-project budget allocation
- Daily/weekly/monthly caps
- Real-time spend tracking
- Budget alert thresholds
- Hard vs soft limit modes

### Usage Tracking and Analytics
- Request logging with metadata
- Cost attribution by user/project/task
- Model performance comparison
- Success rate tracking
- Token usage patterns
- ROI analysis per model

## Supported Providers (Initial)
- Anthropic (Claude models)
- OpenAI (GPT models)
- Google (Gemini models)
- AWS Bedrock (multi-model)
- Azure OpenAI
- Local models (Ollama, vLLM)

## Implementation Notes
- Unified request/response format across providers
- Provider-specific adapters
- Async request handling
- Request queuing for rate limits
- Credential management per provider
- Caching layer for repeated queries

## Configuration
- YAML-based routing rules
- Dynamic rule updates without restart
- A/B testing support for routing strategies
- Custom routing logic plugins

## Testing Requirements
- Mock providers for unit tests
- Routing decision validation
- Budget enforcement tests
- Failover scenario tests
- Load testing for routing performance","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:51.00887812-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:51.00887812-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-4lr","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-ptr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:43:27.981640477-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-4lr","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-7hb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:43:28.00998441-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-4lr","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-e27","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:43:28.039880213-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-4m0","title":"fcp.salesforce: Salesforce CRM Platform Connector","description":"# fcp.salesforce - Salesforce CRM Platform Connector

## Overview
Enterprise Salesforce CRM connector supporting full Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Platform operations with bidirectional data sync capabilities.

## Archetype
**Hybrid: Request-Response + Webhook + Polling**

## Key Operations
- CRM Object CRUD: Contact, Lead, Account, Opportunity, Case, Custom objects
- Query: SOQL, SOSL, Reports, Dashboards
- Bulk: Insert/Update/Upsert/Delete/Query for large datasets
- Workflow: Flow triggers, Approval processes
- Auth: OAuth 2.0 (Web, JWT Bearer), Enterprise SSO

## API Support
- REST API (primary), SOAP API (legacy), Bulk API 2.0, Streaming API, Metadata API

## Dependencies
- fcp-core, fcp-oauth, fcp-ratelimit, fcp-testkit, fcp-telemetry, fcp-webhook

## Sub-Features (consolidated)
This connector encompasses: Enterprise SSO, Bulk data ops, REST/SOAP dual support, Workflow integration, SOQL engine, Custom objects, Contact/Lead/Account/Opportunity management","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:09:03.669701739-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:09:15.617284671-05:00"}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-4mk","title":"fcp.reddit: Subreddit Browsing and Search","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:20.930097995-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:20.930097995-05:00"}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-4n0q","title":"TEST: fcp-streaming Unit Test Suite","description":"# TEST: fcp-streaming Unit Test Suite

## Scope
Comprehensive unit tests for streaming and SSE library.

## Test Categories

### Server-Sent Events (SSE)
- [ ] Event parsing (data, event, id, retry fields)
- [ ] Multi-line data handling
- [ ] Event ID tracking for reconnection
- [ ] Retry interval handling
- [ ] Connection keep-alive

### WebSocket Support
- [ ] Connection establishment
- [ ] Message framing (text, binary)
- [ ] Ping/pong handling
- [ ] Graceful close
- [ ] Reconnection with backoff

### Stream Processing
- [ ] Backpressure handling
- [ ] Buffer management
- [ ] Stream cancellation
- [ ] Timeout enforcement

### Error Recovery
- [ ] Network disconnection
- [ ] Partial message handling
- [ ] Reconnection with last-event-id
- [ ] Maximum reconnection attempts

### Performance
- [ ] Zero-copy parsing where possible
- [ ] Memory allocation limits
- [ ] Large message handling

## Mocking Strategy
- Mock SSE endpoints returning controlled event streams
- Mock WebSocket servers with programmable responses
- Inject network errors at specific points

## Coverage Target: >90%","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:12:35.391386702-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:20:56.472903863-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-4n0q","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-9co","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:20:56.502736885-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-xo3e","title":"fcp.elasticsearch: Elasticsearch Search and Analytics Connector","description":"# fcp.elasticsearch - Elasticsearch Search and Analytics Connector

## Overview
Elasticsearch connector for full-text search, analytics, and log aggregation.

## Archetype
**Database**

## Key Operations

### Document Operations
- `es.index` - Index document
- `es.get` - Get document by ID
- `es.delete` - Delete document
- `es.update` - Update document
- `es.bulk` - Bulk operations
- `es.mget` - Multi-get
- `es.reindex` - Reindex documents

### Search Operations
- `es.search` - Search documents
- `es.msearch` - Multi-search
- `es.count` - Count documents
- `es.scroll` - Scroll API for large results
- `es.point_in_time` - Point-in-time search
- `es.search_template` - Templated search
- `es.explain` - Explain query scoring

### Query Types
- match, match_phrase, multi_match
- term, terms, range
- bool (must, should, must_not, filter)
- nested, has_child, has_parent
- geo_distance, geo_bounding_box
- fuzzy, wildcard, regexp
- more_like_this

### Aggregations
- Metric: avg, sum, min, max, stats, cardinality
- Bucket: terms, histogram, date_histogram, range
- Pipeline: derivative, moving_avg, cumulative_sum
- Matrix: matrix_stats

### Index Operations
- `es.indices.create` - Create index
- `es.indices.delete` - Delete index
- `es.indices.get` - Get index info
- `es.indices.exists` - Check existence
- `es.indices.refresh` - Refresh index
- `es.indices.flush` - Flush index
- `es.indices.open/close` - Open/close index

### Mapping Operations
- `es.indices.mapping.get` - Get mapping
- `es.indices.mapping.put` - Update mapping

### Alias Operations
- `es.indices.alias.get` - Get aliases
- `es.indices.alias.add/remove` - Manage aliases

### Cluster Operations
- `es.cluster.health` - Cluster health
- `es.cluster.stats` - Cluster statistics
- `es.nodes.info` - Node information

### Analysis
- `es.indices.analyze` - Analyze text
- Custom analyzers, tokenizers, filters

## Providers Supported
- Elasticsearch (self-hosted)
- Elastic Cloud
- AWS OpenSearch
- Azure Cognitive Search (partial)

## Authentication
- Basic authentication
- API key
- Cloud ID (Elastic Cloud)
- AWS IAM (OpenSearch)

## Rate Limits
- Bulk request size limits
- Scroll context limits
- Circuit breaker settings

## Zone Architecture
```
Zone 0 (Public):     Cluster info
Zone 1 (Authorized): Search operations
Zone 2 (Private):    Document data
Zone 3 (Sensitive):  Admin operations, credentials
```

+{"id":"flywheel_connectors-xo3e","title":"fcp.elasticsearch: Elasticsearch Search and Analytics Connector","description":"# fcp.elasticsearch - Elasticsearch Search and Analytics Connector

## Overview
Elasticsearch connector for full-text search, analytics, and log aggregation.

## Archetype
**Database**

## Key Operations

### Document Operations
- `es.index` - Index document
- `es.get` - Get document by ID
- `es.delete` - Delete document
- `es.update` - Update document
- `es.bulk` - Bulk operations
- `es.mget` - Multi-get
- `es.reindex` - Reindex documents

### Search Operations
- `es.search` - Search documents
- `es.msearch` - Multi-search
- `es.count` - Count documents
- `es.scroll` - Scroll API for large results
- `es.point_in_time` - Point-in-time search
- `es.search_template` - Templated search
- `es.explain` - Explain query scoring

### Query Types
- match, match_phrase, multi_match
- term, terms, range
- bool (must, should, must_not, filter)
- nested, has_child, has_parent
- geo_distance, geo_bounding_box
- fuzzy, wildcard, regexp
- more_like_this

### Aggregations
- Metric: avg, sum, min, max, stats, cardinality
- Bucket: terms, histogram, date_histogram, range
- Pipeline: derivative, moving_avg, cumulative_sum
- Matrix: matrix_stats

### Index Operations
- `es.indices.create` - Create index
- `es.indices.delete` - Delete index
- `es.indices.get` - Get index info
- `es.indices.exists` - Check existence
- `es.indices.refresh` - Refresh index
- `es.indices.flush` - Flush index
- `es.indices.open/close` - Open/close index

### Mapping Operations
- `es.indices.mapping.get` - Get mapping
- `es.indices.mapping.put` - Update mapping

### Alias Operations
- `es.indices.alias.get` - Get aliases
- `es.indices.alias.add/remove` - Manage aliases

### Cluster Operations
- `es.cluster.health` - Cluster health
- `es.cluster.stats` - Cluster statistics
- `es.nodes.info` - Node information

### Analysis
- `es.indices.analyze` - Analyze text
- Custom analyzers, tokenizers, filters

## Providers Supported
- Elasticsearch (self-hosted)
- Elastic Cloud
- AWS OpenSearch
- Azure Cognitive Search (partial)

## Authentication
- Basic authentication
- API key
- Cloud ID (Elastic Cloud)
- AWS IAM (OpenSearch)

## Rate Limits
- Bulk request size limits
- Scroll context limits
- Circuit breaker settings

## Zone Architecture
```
Zone 0 (Public):     Cluster info
Zone 1 (Authorized): Search operations
Zone 2 (Private):    Document data
Zone 3 (Sensitive):  Admin operations, credentials
```

## Dependencies
- fcp-core, fcp-ratelimit, fcp-testkit, fcp-telemetry","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:37:09.690582798-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:37:35.081232854-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-xo3e","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-krt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:48:00.098142606-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-xo3e","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-zx0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:48:00.135038456-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-xo3e","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-iv7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:48:00.171264513-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","title":"fcp.twitter - X/Twitter API Connector","description":"# fcp.twitter - X/Twitter API Connector

## Overview
Full-featured Twitter/X API connector supporting social listening, content publishing, and real-time engagement workflows.

## Archetype
**Hybrid: Request-Response + Streaming + Webhook**
- Request-Response: Tweet CRUD, user lookups, search
- Streaming: Filtered stream API for real-time monitoring
- Webhook: Account Activity API for mentions, DMs, follows

## Key Operations

### Read Operations
- `twitter.search.tweets` - Search tweets with advanced query syntax
- `twitter.search.users` - User discovery and lookup
- `twitter.timeline.user` - Get user timeline
- `twitter.timeline.home` - Get authenticated user home timeline
- `twitter.trends.location` - Get trending topics by WOEID
- `twitter.trends.available` - List available trend locations
- `twitter.user.get` - Get user profile by ID or username
- `twitter.user.followers` - Get user followers with pagination
- `twitter.user.following` - Get accounts user follows
- `twitter.tweet.get` - Get tweet by ID with expansions
- `twitter.tweet.quotes` - Get quote tweets
- `twitter.tweet.retweets` - Get retweeters
- `twitter.dm.list` - List DM conversations
- `twitter.dm.get` - Get DM conversation messages

### Write Operations
- `twitter.tweet.create` - Post new tweet
- `twitter.tweet.reply` - Reply to existing tweet
- `twitter.thread.create` - Create tweet thread (atomic)
- `twitter.tweet.delete` - Delete owned tweet
- `twitter.tweet.retweet` - Retweet
- `twitter.tweet.like` - Like tweet
- `twitter.dm.send` - Send direct message
- `twitter.user.follow` - Follow user
- `twitter.user.unfollow` - Unfollow user
- `twitter.list.create` - Create list
- `twitter.list.add_member` - Add user to list

### Stream Operations
- `twitter.stream.filtered` - Filtered stream with rules
- `twitter.stream.rules.add` - Add stream filter rules
- `twitter.stream.rules.delete` - Remove stream rules
- `twitter.stream.sample` - 1% sample stream

### Webhook Operations
- `twitter.webhook.register` - Register webhook URL
- `twitter.webhook.subscriptions` - Manage account subscriptions
- `twitter.webhook.crc` - Handle CRC challenge

## API Version Support
- **v2 API (Primary)**: Modern endpoints, better rate limits
- **v1.1 API (Fallback)**: Legacy endpoints for unsupported v2 features
- Automatic version negotiation based on operation

## Rate Limit Strategy
- Token rotation pool (multiple app credentials)
- Per-endpoint rate limit tracking
- Exponential backoff with jitter
- Rate limit headers parsing (x-rate-limit-*)
- Request queuing with priority levels
- Burst protection with sliding window

## Zone Architecture
```
Zone 0 (Public):     Search results, public tweets, trends
Zone 1 (Authorized): Authenticated timelines, user data
Zone 2 (Private):    DM content, account settings
Zone 3 (Sensitive):  OAuth tokens, app credentials
```

## Dependencies
- `fcp-core`: Base connector traits, zone management
- `fcp-oauth`: OAuth 1.0a and OAuth 2.0 PKCE flows
- `fcp-streaming`: SSE/streaming response handling
- `fcp-webhook`: Webhook endpoint management

## Integration Points
- **Flywheel Beads**: Auto-create beads from tracked mentions
- **Flywheel Agents**: Social monitoring agent workflows
- **Flywheel Analytics**: Sentiment analysis pipeline
- **fcp.openai**: Sentiment classification integration

## Implementation Notes
- Use Twitter API v2 client library as base
- Implement automatic media upload chunking
- Handle Twitter Cards metadata extraction
- Support poll creation and results
- Implement conversation threading reconstruction","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:11:16.535999911-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:11:16.535999911-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-lj2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:41:02.752417122-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-zx0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:41:03.293153677-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-9co","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:41:03.794751598-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-iv7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:41:04.354450547-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-yff","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-krt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:41:04.912417755-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
